hero.subtitle: Data inventory, DSARs, incidents, assessments, and vendor management — all in one open platform designed for startups that need to get compliant fast.
hero.login: Already have an account? Log in
social.title: Built for startups handling personal data
social.s1: GDPR ready out of the box
value.label: Why DPO Central
value.heading.prefix: Your privacy program deserves better than
value.v1.title: Map every processing activity
value.v1.desc: Maintain a living Record of Processing Activities. Track data categories, lawful bases, retention periods, and data flows. Generate Art. 30 reports on demand.
value.v2.title: Handle DSARs at scale
value.v2.desc: A dedicated portal where data subjects submit access, deletion, or rectification requests. Track deadlines and respond within regulatory timelines.
value.v3.title: From breach to notification in 72h
value.v3.desc: Log, assess, and escalate data breaches with structured workflows. Automatic Art. 33/34 analysis for authority and data subject notification.
value.v4.title: Structured impact assessments
value.v4.desc: Guided workflows for DPIAs, LIAs, and TIAs. Smart risk scoring, heat maps, and mitigation recommendations included.
workflow.label: How It Works
workflow.s1.title: Build your data inventory
workflow.s1.desc: Map processing activities, data categories, and lawful bases.
workflow.s2.title: Set up your DSAR portal
workflow.s2.desc: Give data subjects a self-service portal to exercise their rights.
workflow.s3.title: Run your assessments
workflow.s3.desc: DPIAs, LIAs, TIAs — guided questionnaires with risk scoring.
workflow.s4.title: Monitor & respond
workflow.s4.desc: Track incidents, manage vendors, and stay audit-ready at all times.
feat.label: Core Capabilities
feat.inv.title: Data Inventory & ROPA
feat.inv.headline: Map every processing activity.
feat.inv.desc: Maintain a living Record of Processing Activities. Track data categories, lawful bases, retention periods, and data flows across your organization.
feat.dsar.title: DSAR Management
feat.dsar.headline: Handle data subject requests at scale.
feat.dsar.desc: A dedicated portal where data subjects submit requests. Track deadlines, assign tasks, and respond within regulatory timelines.
feat.inc.title: Incident Tracking
feat.inc.headline: From breach detection to notification.
feat.inc.desc: Log, assess, and escalate breaches. Automatically evaluate whether notification to the supervisory authority or data subjects is required.
feat.vendor.title: Vendor Management
feat.vendor.headline: Know your processors.
feat.vendor.desc: Track processors and sub-processors. Manage DPAs, run vendor risk assessments, and maintain an up-to-date vendor register.
cta.text: Start managing your privacy program today. Free for startups.
